parameters.name: vdd
parameters.override_behavior: sets the symmetric positive and negative output clipping magnitude

parameters.name: vth_clk
parameters.override_behavior: sets the rising clock threshold that reports and rearms each measurement window

parameters.name: vth_in
parameters.override_behavior: sets the rising threshold independently used to timestamp vinp and vinn

parameters.name: td
parameters.override_behavior: sets output transition delay after a reported measurement

parameters.name: scale
parameters.override_behavior: multiplies the signed input edge-time difference before clipping

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic threshold-crossing event detection and per-window state.
Capture no more than one rising edge per input in each clock window.
Do not use fixed stimulus timestamps, current contributions, or validation-only hooks.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: Within each clock window, only the first rising vinp crossing and first rising vinn crossing through vth_in define the stored timing measurement.
At each rising clk crossing through vth_clk, vout reports the edge-time difference captured in the preceding valid clock window; if either input edge was absent, vout holds its previous value.
The reported value preserves the sign of the vinp first-edge time minus the vinn first-edge time and applies the public scale factor.
The scaled reported voltage is bounded to the closed interval from -vdd to +vdd.
Each reporting clock edge rearms both input-edge detectors so the next window is measured independently.
Reported output changes use the declared td delay and tr transition time.

title: Time Diff Detector
